doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date), references non-existent EDPB documents from 2014 (before the EDPB existed), and uses an atypical format inconsistent with genuine EDPB publications.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document references a 2026 date that has not yet occurred, and the EDPB does not use "Guidance Note" as a formal document type in this format, and the cited supersession of "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" does not exist (the EDPB was established in 2018).
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date), references non-existent EDPB documents from 2014 (before the EDPB existed), and uses an atypical format inconsistent with genuine EDPB publications.
